name: @callmcp/driver-kaicalls
description: CallMCP hosted driver for KaiCalls (kaicalls.com) — the flagship, fullest-parity driver, mapping the CallMCP Driver contract onto KaiCalls' live 44-tool MCP/REST telephony backend. Normative references: SPEC.md at the repo root and a live tools/list call against https://callmcp.ai/mcp for the confirmed field-level contract this driver targets.
